en.name: Level 7 — Thalassophobia
en.shortDescription: An impossibly vast ocean under a concrete ceiling, split into zones that grow darker, colder and deadlier with depth.
en.atmosphere: Frigid desolate underwater expanse, skeletal remains on the seafloor, dim ambient light fading into hostile black depths.
en.tips: Use the furnished entrance as base camp. Exploit each entity's weakness (light, then hearing) to slip between territories.
